**Internal Deal Memo: Project Zenith**

Date: October 25, 2023

To: Mr. Oliver Green, Acquisitions Lead  
From: Dr. Fiona Tan, Senior Analyst  
Subject: Project Zenith Acquisition

We are pleased to present the strategic acquisition of Quantum Tech Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202345678W) under the codename Project Zenith. The total purchase consideration is set at SGD 75,000,000 as outlined in the Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). Please note that the project plan does not currently include a detailed risk assessment, which remains a pending task.

Our internal analysis has confirmed that the acquisition aligns with our broader market expansion goals. However, the project status requires further updates on the integration timeline.

For further inquiries, contact Mr. Green at +65 7654 3210 or via email at oliver.green@futuresg.sg. Also, refer to the secure document portal at https://secureportal.sg/user/S8765432L for detailed financial models. Dr. Tan can be reached at fiona.tan@futuresg.sg for any analytical support.

Please ensure compliance with all stipulated terms in the SPA.
